close_reason: Created solidity_contract.bzl for extracting contract artifacts
description:
Create nix/buck2/prelude-extensions/solidity/solidity_contract.bzl

Attributes:
- contract: name of contract to extract
- deps: solidity_library targets

Outputs:
- {name}.abi - Contract ABI (JSON)
- {name}.bin - Deployment bytecode (hex)
- {name}.metadata - Compiler metadata

Implementation:
- Read compiled output from deps
- Extract specific contract artifacts
- Return SolidityContractInfo provider

Part of Solidity support (turnkey-ri2t).
title: Create solidity_contract rule
